presets.name: Standard Five Parsecs
presets.description: Default enemy mix from all factions. Encounters may include raiders, corporate security, aliens, cultists, or military forces based on mission context.

presets.name: Pirate Hunting
presets.description: Focus on raiders, smugglers, and space pirates. Ideal for campaigns centered on hunting down criminal elements in the Fringe.

presets.name: Xenos Extermination
presets.description: Alien creatures dominate encounters. Perfect for exploration campaigns on frontier worlds teeming with hostile wildlife.

presets.name: Corporate Conflict
presets.description: Corporate security and military forces dominate. Suited for campaigns involving mega-corp disputes and military contracts.

presets.name: Bug Hunt
presets.description: Alien bug swarms with no morale and swarm mechanics. A desperate fight for survival against overwhelming insectoid horrors.
